name: opennori
description: Repo-native Plan, Implement, Verify, and Finish workflow with outcome-driven completion.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native agent workflow with outcome-driven completion.
interface.longDescription: OpenNori carries a coding goal from a directly openable, human-readable Contract to verified Git delivery. Agents can add design and execution-plan Markdown when the work needs it, while deterministic state tracks approval, Evidence, and delivery without constraining the implementation process. OpenNori uses a fresh Codex reviewer by default and falls back transparently when unavailable; Claude Code verifies sequentially, and both paths refuse completion while a required result is still missing. Shared repository state, safe upgrades, and project-scoped history keep later conversations useful without turning chat history into project truth.
defaultPrompt: Help with my goal. Ask before creating an OpenNori task.
